rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow customers to search for products.
The system shall allow customers to add products to their wishlist.
The system shall allow customers to move items from their wishlist to the shopping cart.
The system shall allow customers to provide or update delivery details for items in the cart.
The system shall allow customers to place orders after providing delivery details.
The system shall enable customers to track their orders after placement.
The system shall allow customers to complete payments for their orders.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows customers to search for products.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A customer starts by searching for a product.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can add products they like to their wishlist.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finding something they like, they can add it to their wishlist and then move it to the cart.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can move items from their wishlist to the shopping cart.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finding something they like, they can add it to their wishlist and then move it to the cart.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows customers to provide or update delivery details for items in the cart.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the item is in the cart, they provide or update their delivery details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can place orders after providing delivery details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After placing the order, they can track it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables customers to track their orders after placement.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After placing the order, they can track it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customers can complete payments for their orders.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, they complete the payment, and it ends.
